ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or town */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the ward is located */,
  " Boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the ward (e.g., polygon coordinates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward where the precinct is located */,
  "polling_location" TEXT /* Location of the polling place for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "campaign_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the candidate's campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate receiving the votes */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "write_ins" INTEGER /* Number of write-in votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the precinct */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election being tracked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the voter resides */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the voter */,
  "voting_history" TEXT /* Voting history of the voter (e.g., previous elections participated in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election being tracked */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where turnout is being measured */,
  "total_registered" INTEGER /* Total registered voters in the precinct */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the precinct */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_ballots" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee ballot record */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter requesting the absentee ballot */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which the ballot is requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the absentee ballot was requested */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the absentee ballot was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the absentee ballot (e.g., pending, received, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_ballots_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_registration ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_ballots_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_places" (
  "polling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling place */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the polling place is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the polling place */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the polling place (how many voters can be accommodated) */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the polling place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the election worker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the worker (e.g., judge, inspector) */,
  "polling_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling place where the worker is assigned */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the worker received training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_workers_polling_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_id") REFERENCES polling_places ("polling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_outcomes" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up candidate */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Margin of victory for the winning candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_outcomes_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_outcomes_runner_up_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
